name: 88 Courtyard Hotel

description:
88 Courtyard Hotel: Nơi lưu trú lý tưởng tại Manila, Philippines

88 Courtyard Hotel là một khách sạn 3 sao nằm ở Manila, Philippines. Với vị trí thuận lợi và dịch vụ chất lượng, khách sạn này là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho du khách muốn khám phá thành phố sôi động này.

Khách sạn có tổng cộng 41 phòng, được xây dựng vào năm 2014. Các phòng nghỉ tại đây được thiết kế hiện đại và tiện nghi, mang đến cho du khách sự thoải mái và tiện lợi. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 02:00 PM, và thời gian trả phòng là 12:00 PM, giúp du khách linh hoạt trong việc đi lại.

Với khoảng cách chỉ 1.9 km từ trung tâm thành phố, du khách có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan, nhà hàng và cửa hàng mua sắm nổi tiếng. Đặc biệt, khách sạn chỉ cách sân bay 20 phút lái xe, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và tiện nghi khi di chuyển.

Đặc biệt, 88 Courtyard Hotel chấp nhận trẻ em từ 0 đến 7 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí. Điều này làm cho khách sạn trở thành lựa chọn lý tưởng cho các gia đình muốn có kỳ nghỉ vui vẻ và tiết kiệm. Với dịch vụ chất lượng và vị trí thuận lợi, 88 Courtyard Hotel hứa hẹn mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại Manila, Philippines.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel tọa lạc tại Manila, Philippines và mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi đáng kinh ngạc. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, giúp du khách có thể yên tâm tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không phải lo lắng về việc lấy đồ hay gọi phục vụ. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có hộp đựng đồ giá trị, giúp bảo vệ tài sản của du khách một cách an toàn và tiện lợi.

Với dịch vụ lễ tân, du khách có thể nhận được sự hỗ trợ tận tâm từ nhân viên khách sạn. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí tại khu vực công cộng và tất cả các phòng. Điều này giúp du khách có thể duy trì kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài và làm việc hiệu quả trong khi lưu trú tại đây. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn có dịch vụ nhận phòng nhanh chóng, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời ngay từ khi đặt chân vào khách sạn. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ để hành lý, đảm bảo rằng du khách có nơi để lưu trữ đồ khi cần thiết. Cuối cùng, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày giúp du khách luôn có một không gian sạch sẽ và thoải mái trong suốt kỳ nghỉ.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển thuận tiện để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách tiện lợi và nhanh chóng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có bãi đậu xe ô tô, bãi đậu xe miễn phí và dịch vụ đỗ xe tại chỗ, giúp khách hàng có thể tự lái xe đến khách sạn một cách thuận tiện và an toàn. Nếu khách hàng muốn khám phá thành phố Manila, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ thuê xe và dịch vụ taxi, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển và khám phá các địa điểm thú vị trong thành phố.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tại 88 Courtyard Hotel Manila

Tại 88 Courtyard Hotel Manila, khách lưu trú sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian thoải mái và tiện nghi với đầy đủ các thiết bị hiện đại. Phòng được trang bị điều hòa không khí giúp duy trì nhiệt độ lý tưởng, mang lại cảm giác dễ chịu suốt ngày dài. Các tiện nghi như máy sấy tóc, truyền hình cáp/satellite, tủ lạnh và minibar đều sẵn sàng phục vụ nhu cầu của bạn, từ giải trí đến giữ đồ ăn uống. Ngoài ra, mỗi phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức không khí trong lành và ngắm nhìn cảnh quan xung quanh.

Bên cạnh đó, các vật dụng cá nhân như đồ vệ sinh cá nhân, nước đóng chai miễn phí và bộ linen cao cấp giúp khách cảm thấy thoải mái và tiện lợi trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Phòng nghỉ tại đây không chỉ mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa mà còn tạo cảm giác ấm cúng, thân thiện, giúp bạn thư giãn và nạp lại năng lượng sau những ngày khám phá thành phố Manila sôi động.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel tọa lạc tại Manila, Philippines, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực. Khách sạn này cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, giúp bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon ngay tại phòng nghỉ của mình. Bạn có thể lựa chọn từ một danh sách đa dạng các món ăn ngon, từ món Âu, món Á cho đến món đặc sản địa phương. Hãy tận hưởng bữa ăn tuyệt vời và thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, giúp du khách luôn có một môi trường sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Bạn không cần lo lắng về việc dọn dẹp sau khi thưởng thức bữa ăn ngon tại phòng nghỉ của mình. Hãy tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với sự tiện nghi và dịch vụ chất lượng tại 88 Courtyard Hotel.

Các loại phòng tại 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel tại Manila, Philippines cung cấp một loạt các loại phòng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Với diện tích từ 25 đến 30 mét vuông, các loại phòng bao gồm Deluxe King Room với 1 giường King, Deluxe Twin Room với 2 giường đôi, Standard với 2 giường đôi, Superior King Room với 1 giường King và Superior Twin Room với 2 giường đôi. Đặt phòng tại 88 Courtyard Hotel thông qua Agoda sẽ mang lại cho bạn những giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, không cần mất thời gian và công sức.

Khám phá vùng Pasay tại Manila, Philippines

Với vị trí đắc địa tại trung tâm Manila, Philippines, vùng Pasay là một điểm đến hấp dẫn cho du khách muốn khám phá nét đặc trưng của thành phố này. Nằm gần sân bay quốc tế Ninoy Aquino, vùng Pasay dễ dàng tiếp cận và thuận lợi cho những du khách đến Manila bằng máy bay. Khách sạn 88 Courtyard Hotel tọa lạc ngay tại vùng Pasay, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm lý tưởng để khám phá vùng này.

Pasay không chỉ nổi tiếng với sân bay quốc tế Ninoy Aquino mà còn có nhiều điểm tham quan và giải trí hấp dẫn. Du khách có thể khám phá các khu vui chơi giải trí như Star City, một công viên giải trí lớn với nhiều trò chơi thú vị và những cuộc phiêu lưu đầy kịch tính. Ngoài ra, vùng Pasay cũng có rất nhiều trung tâm thương mại, nhà hàng, quán bar và các điểm mua sắm, đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy buồn chán khi ở đây. Với vị trí thuận lợi và nhiều hoạt động thú vị, vùng Pasay là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách khi đến Manila, và khách sạn 88 Courtyard Hotel là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời để khám phá vùng này.

Hướng dẫn đến 88 Courtyard Hotel từ sân bay gần Manila, Philippines

Khi bạn đặt chân đến Manila, Philippines, có một số sân bay gần khu vực này mà bạn có thể sử dụng để đến 88 Courtyard Hotel ở Pasay, Manila. Sân bay quốc tế Ninoy Aquino là sân bay chính của Manila và cách khách sạn chỉ 7 km. Để đến 88 Courtyard Hotel từ sân bay này, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc dùng Grab, ứng dụng đặt xe nổi tiếng ở Đông Nam Á. Đây là cách nhanh nhất và tiện lợi nhất để đến khách sạn. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay đến 88 Courtyard Hotel khoảng 20 phút tùy thuộc vào lưu lượng giao thông.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan gần 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel nằm cách một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng ở Manila chỉ trong khoảng cách đi bộ ngắn. Quý khách có thể dễ dàng đến thăm Dr.Elvira Manalto-Lagrosa Health Center, một trung tâm y tế uy tín trong khu vực. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá văn hóa địa phương, hãy ghé thăm chợ địa phương nằm gần đó. Đối diện với khách sạn còn có Astudillo-Dangoy Dental Implant Centre và Malibay Health Center, nơi bạn có thể tìm kiếm dịch vụ y tế chất lượng. 

Khách sạn cũng nằm gần Thành phố Pasay Manila, nơi có nhiều cửa hàng, nhà hàng và quán cà phê thú vị. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian xanh mát, hãy ghé qua Derham Park hoặc Holy Trinity Church, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và tìm hiểu về lịch sử địa phương. Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm nơi để đỗ xe, Park N' Fly cũng nằm gần khách sạn. Với vị trí thuận lợi và những điểm tham quan hấp dẫn xung quanh, 88 Courtyard Hotel là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Manila.

Tiện ích giao thông công cộng xung quanh 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel nằm trong vị trí thuận lợi, với nhiều trạm giao thông công cộng trong khu vực. Khách sạn nằm gần Manila Light Rail Transit System, chỉ cách Trạm MRT Taft Avenue và Trạm LRT Baclaran chỉ một vài bước chân. Điều này giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển đến các điểm tham quan và mua sắm nổi tiếng trong thành phố. 

Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng gần Trạm LRT Libertad và Trạm LRT EDSA, cung cấp thêm sự tiện lợi cho du khách khi muốn khám phá Manila. Với các tuyến giao thông công cộng này, du khách có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận các khu vực khác của thành phố, bao gồm cả trung tâm thương mại, khu vui chơi giải trí và các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng. Với vị trí thuận lợi như vậy, 88 Courtyard Hotel là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Manila một cách dễ dàng và tiện lợi.

Nhà hàng xung quanh 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel có vị trí lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá ẩm thực địa phương. Khách sạn nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng như Quirino Bakery, Curbi Josefa V. Restaurant, Cardo's Tapsihan, Zhang Ji Noodle House, Pinoy Star Cafe, Elyglofan, CBCR Choice Buffet Choice Restaurant, Bg Takoyummy Pasay, Turks - Victory Pasay Mall và Bailey's Kitchen PH. Tại đây, bạn có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đặc trưng của Philippines và trải nghiệm văn hóa ẩm thực độc đáo của đất nước này. Từ các món bánh mì tươi ngon, mì xào hấp dẫn, đến các món ăn hải sản tươi sống và món thịt nướng thơm ngon, bạn sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán khi thưởng thức ẩm thực ở đây.

Tham quan các điểm mua sắm xung quanh 88 Courtyard Hotel

Nằm trong khu vực thuộc Civil Aviation Authority of the Philippines, 88 Courtyard Hotel là một điểm dừng chân lý tưởng cho du khách muốn tham quan các điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng. Khách sạn chỉ cách Jw summit và Newport Mall vài bước chân. Jw summit là một trung tâm mua sắm sang trọng với nhiều cửa hàng chuyên bán các sản phẩm cao cấp và thời trang hàng đầu. Trong khi đó, Newport Mall là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn khám phá thế giới mua sắm với nhiều cửa hàng, nhà hàng, rạp chiếu phim và sòng bạc. Với vị trí thuận lợi này, du khách sẽ có cơ hội trải nghiệm những trải nghiệm mua sắm độc đáo và thú vị ngay tại 88 Courtyard Hotel.

Giá phòng trung bình tại 88 Courtyard Hotel so sánh với giá phòng trung bình tại cùng thành phố

Với giá phòng trung bình chỉ $52, 88 Courtyard Hotel là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Manila, Philippines. So với giá phòng trung bình tại thành phố là $60, khách sạn này không chỉ mang đến một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời mà còn tiết kiệm được một khoản tiền đáng kể. Với mức giá hấp dẫn như vậy, du khách có thể tận hưởng các tiện nghi và dịch vụ tuyệt vời mà khách sạn cung cấp, bao gồm nhà hàng, quầy bar và bể bơi ngoài trời. Không chỉ vậy, vị trí thuận lợi của khách sạn cũng giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và khu mua sắm nổi tiếng của thành phố.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại 88 Courtyard Hotel

88 Courtyard Hotel là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Manila, Philippines, nhận được nhiều đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Đội ngũ nhân viên tại đây rất tốt và thân thiện, luôn chào đón khách một cách nhiệt tình. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng rất thuận lợi, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển và khám phá thành phố. Đặc biệt, giường và trang thiết bị phòng ngủ tại đây rất tốt, mang đến sự thoải mái cho khách hàng. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ tại khách sạn cũng rất xuất sắc, với các phòng được giữ gìn sạch sẽ và rộng rãi. Nhân viên tại đây thân thiện và hỗ trợ, luôn nhớ về khách hàng và mang đến trải nghiệm tuyệt vời.

88 Courtyard Hotel: Khách sạn tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

88 Courtyard Hotel là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Manila, Philippines, được đánh giá cao bởi khách hàng. Với tổng điểm đánh giá 8.3/10, khách sạn này đáng để bạn khám phá. Một trong những điểm mạnh của khách sạn này là giá trị tuyệt vời, với điểm đánh giá 8.2/10. Bạn sẽ nhận thấy rằng giá cả phải chăng so với chất lượng dịch vụ mà bạn nhận được tại đây. 

Khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao về tiện nghi, với điểm đánh giá 7.9/10. Bạn sẽ tìm thấy tất cả những tiện ích cần thiết để có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái tại đây. Tuy nhiên, điểm yếu duy nhất của khách sạn là ẩm thực, với điểm đánh giá 6.5/10. Tuy vậy, với vị trí đắc địa, khách sạn này thu hút được nhiều du khách với điểm đánh giá 8.6/10. 

Ngoài ra, sự sạch sẽ của khách sạn cũng đáng khen ngợi với điểm đánh giá 8.3/10. Bạn sẽ cảm thấy thoải mái và hài lòng khi ở đây, với điểm đánh giá về sự thoải mái là 7.9/10. Đội ngũ nhân viên tại 88 Courtyard Hotel cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm 8.6/10 về hiệu suất làm việc. Họ sẽ luôn sẵn lòng giúp đỡ bạn trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại khách sạn này. 

Với những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng, 88 Courtyard Hotel là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn tại Manila, Philippines.

sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã ở lại 2 đêm vào tháng 4. Nhân viên ở lễ tân, nhân viên mở cửa và tất cả mọi người đều rất thân thiện và rất chu đáo.

Khách sạn có vẻ hơi cũ, nhưng phòng ốc được giữ gìn sạch sẽ. Trang thiết bị trong phòng không có vấn đề gì và đầy đủ những gì cần thiết. Nếu phải nói, tôi cảm thấy áp lực nước trong vòi sen hơi yếu một chút.

Bữa sáng có thể chọn món Tây tại nhà hàng Kenny Rogers bên cạnh.

Vị trí thì không xa sân bay, gần trung tâm thành phố và Mall Of Asia, các cửa hàng tiện lợi, siêu thị, và các cửa hàng đồ ăn nhanh cũng trong khoảng cách đi bộ, thật tuyệt vời.

Một điểm tôi cảm thấy lo ngại là do gần sân bay, nên trong các khoảng thời gian nhất định, tôi cảm thấy tiếng máy bay có hơi ồn ào.
sample_comments.title: Nhân viên thân thiện
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

Thank you for your recent stay at our Hotel. We appreciate your feedback and we are very pleased to hear that you are delighted with your stay. We hope to see you again on your next visit to the city. 

With much appreciation,
88 Courtyard Hotel

sample_comments.title: comfortable & close to Airport
sample_comments.negatives: we weren't able to sleep due to the amount of noise from children using the swimming pool...

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: Upon arrival and check in I learned that the air conditioner in the first room did not work so they moved me to another room and that room appears to be still under renovation and it's not a very good .no bath Matt in the shower and you will slip and fall

sample_comments.text:
Nhân viên rất thân thiện và khi có yêu cầu thì ngay lập tức làm cho mình.

Thời gian check-in là 2 giờ và check-out là 12 giờ, nhưng khoảng 12 giờ rưỡi thì được check-in sớm.

Nếu nói theo tiêu chuẩn của người Hàn Quốc, tivi là của Samsung nên có Samsung TV Plus? Có cái gì đó để xem chương trình CJ thể thao.

Và wifi thì hoạt động tốt... không nhanh nhưng cũng không bị ngắt quãng.

YouTube chạy tốt.

Mình chưa sử dụng bể bơi nên không biết.

Bữa sáng không phải là kiểu buffet mà phục vụ, có hơi mất thời gian. Cấu trúc món ăn khá giống nhau nên nếu ăn lâu sẽ cảm thấy chán.

Kết cấu của khách sạn cho phép Grab vào đến quầy lễ tân, vì vậy không có vấn đề gì khi gọi taxi.

Mình chưa thấy côn trùng trong phòng.

sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: I like the place and it's super clean

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.positives: Location was accessible to the airport and convenience store
sample_comments.negatives: So frustrated staying there.Stinky washroom, loud voices at the hall at night time, didn't provided the service we need for early flight and breakfast but confirmed they will provide,decided to pack it but didn't put forks and spoons.

sample_comments.text: Từ ngày 22 đến 27 tháng 11, tôi đã ở lại 5 đêm và hoàn toàn hài lòng với mọi thứ. Tôi dự định sẽ sử dụng dịch vụ này trong chuyến đi tháng 12. Đầu tiên, vị trí rất thuận lợi. Gần SM Mall of Asia, sân bay và dễ dàng di chuyển đến Makati. Bên cạnh đó, xung quanh có nhiều nhà hàng ngon. Bữa sáng cũng có 10 món để lựa chọn, thật tuyệt vời. Hơn nữa, phòng được dọn dẹp hàng ngày, rất thoải mái để sử dụng. Nhân viên cũng rất thân thiện. Hẹn gặp lại sớm!

sample_comments.title: Not pleasant stay
sample_comments.text: Should have booked to bigger hotel. Asked for connecting room when i originally booked but wasn't fullfil and had to upgrade pay xtra, manager is unprofessional and unconsidered. Will not recommend it
sample_comments.response:
Greetings from 88 Courtyard Hotel!

Thank you for sharing your feedback. Upon reviewing your reservation, we noted that the original booking was for a Superior King Room. Please be advised that this room category does not have a connecting room option available.

To accommodate your request for connecting rooms, our staff offered an upgrade to our Superior Twin Room, which has connecting room availability. As discussed during check-in, this room change is subject to an upgrade fee in accordance with hotel policy which you agreed to pay upon check-in.

Additionally, the extra charge applied was for an additional guest staying overnight beyond the number of registered and paid occupants. During check-in, it was explained that the room rate covers two (2) persons only, and corresponding charges apply for extra guests.

We appreciate your understanding and thank you for staying with us.

Should you have any questions or need any clarification, please do not hesitate to contact us directly

sample_comments.title: Unwelcoming staff
sample_comments.text: Sheila the receptionist was very rude and her team leader don't know how to handle situation as well. An apology was been said when we ask there's no single apology from your side and that's the time they remember.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for bringing your concerns to our attention. Please accept our sincere apologies for the
inconvenience you experienced during your stay. 

Your feedback has been escalated to our management team and relevant departments to ensure
that appropriate improvements are implemented. We value your insights, as they play an essential
role in helping us grow and improve as a hotel.
We truly hope you will allow us another opportunity to regain your trust and provide you with the
quality experience you deserve.

Kind regards,
88 Courtyard Hotel

sample_comments.text: Nothing worth to stay in this hotel. It was not late at night I would not stay at this dirty place.

sample_comments.title: Not good at all
sample_comments.text: It was the worst hotel, asked for my room to be cleaned and when returning back from a long day out the bed wasn't made up. The room was a Smokey room burned carpet marks and very dusty... requested for a large bed they gave twin beds . Front desk said we can't accommodate the change but rooms were available... paid for the breakfast and had to go outside to a different restaurant with a small selection of food choices for breakfast.... Will never go back to this hotel again!!!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Anestis, 

Thank you for letting us know about the issues that you experienced during your recent stay at our property. Reviews like these give us an opportunity to address areas of improvement. With regards to the Make Up room, our Housekeeping ensures that all guest rooms are serviced upon request of the guest between 9AM-5PM daily. Upon checking with your reservation, you booked for our Superior Twin Room and we have received your request for large bed and added it to your reservation however please understand that this may be subject to availability on your check-in date. All mentioned problems were already escalated to our management and we have discussed this already with the team to reevaluate and determine what needs to be given our full attention to enhance or improve our services. 
We do hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, so we can provide a better experience. 

With much appreciation, 
Jhoanna Marie Gasis
Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: worst i never stayed
sample_comments.text: First i booked hotel with excitement because of location and some facilities. Unfortunately, i decided to rebook and keep communicating through agoda and hotel. The agoda never answered any concern, even the hotel. They just let the day pass until your done with booking that you never stayed. Worst worst communication with the staff that they never address comcern. I will never ever book again in this hotel even with Agoda. Ip paid 2300 pesos and just thank you. Not recommended and never to recommend to anybody.
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for booking with us. However, we apologized for the inconvenience you encountered during your stay and if there was miscommunication with your reservations online through Agoda.

While you have expressed that you would like to avoid staying with us again, we hope you can provide us with another chance to improve your impression of our Hotel in your future visits to Manila.

With much appreciation,
Jhoanna Marie Gasis / Front Office Supervisor

sample_comments.title: Noisy & Internet bad
sample_comments.text: The location is noisy, there are construction noisy till every midnight 11:00pm to 1:00am depends. It is crazy. What's more the Wifi is stupid. Could not get access to the Wifi at most of time in the room. A disappointed tourist

sample_comments.title: Worst nightmare
sample_comments.text: We stayed in one of the standard room for a night before our next flight to Palawan the next morning. The room was spray with some chemical that is so overpowering leaving us feeling suffocate. When we inform the staff about it, the only help they could offer is to open the door. We asked for an extra tower to cover our nose and they wanted to charged us for the extra tower. Although the agreed to give us for FOC in the end, the tower never came. It was the most torturous night I ever had. I have experience staying in numerous hotel and hostel. I would say this hotel is worst than a hostel. Why pay for a room that you need sleep with open door?

sample_comments.title: not so good (staff) hotel
sample_comments.text: the staff is not friendly, the pool is dirty and the wifi was not working, instead of helping they were just blame my phone. location is ok. but nothing' special. i will not recommend this hotel to my friends. the price is too high for such avarage quality.

sample_comments.title: Terrible hotel in a terrible part of the city
sample_comments.negatives: Terrible hotel. In front of the hotel entrance, there was some kind of market full of strange people. The breakfast consisted of some thrown-together sandwiches with rice from a nearby place. Extremely noisy, both from airplanes and from the air conditioning in the rooms.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: very unclean and the bathroom was horrible sheets dirty and room was small and dirty

sample_comments.title: Disappointing!
sample_comments.negatives: Room is so outdated, only two worn out brownish towels given. No hot water for shower, no counter to put your toiletries. Dirty blackish brown, worn out carpet flooring. Loose tiles on the hallway I almost tripped on. Breakfast included means you go to the next door Kenny Rogers restaurant and eat there. They require P2,000 pesos cash only deposit (refundable) when you check out.

sample_comments.title: The worst hotel I have ever checked in in my life ,the shower room does not drain .
sample_comments.text: The bathroom smell like infested with roaches, no vanity and dirty.

sample_comments.title: Poor facilities. No internet connection in a room.
sample_comments.text: Uncomfortable. No wifi connection, no refrigerator, aircon broken down, breakfast starts very late at 7:30 am, it should start 6:00 am. Overall I will not come back to stay in this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Staff failed successfully
sample_comments.text: When we got there, we didn't knew where to park, since very limited ang parking spaces for guest, but we were in front of the main entrance of the hotel, the security of the hotel then approached us and asked if we are about to check in, mind you this was like 5-7minutes figuring out where to park and he could actually see us since he was just a few feet away from the vehicle, i then told him that we have an online booking, he then instructed us to park near restaurant near the hotel, thinking he would assist us, he just went back to his podium and just looked at us parked. No one from the hotel even bothered to help us bring down our luggages. When we got back to main entrance, the security wasn't even there to open the main lobby door, as we checked in, we where charged with an extra person worth ₱800.00 but clearly i booked a 3 person room, then we proceeded to our room. When we got into the room, we immediately wanted to connect to the wifi since one of us is working remotely, the WiFi password wasn't working and we couldn't connect, we called the front desk asking if they have given us a different password, they just told us to refresh our gadgets, but to no avail, we still couldn't connect until we decided to them again, they told us that they didn't change the password, they then ask someone to come to our room to check the WiFi, and actually have the nerve to simply tell us to just scan the QR code to connect, as if we didnt know how to use the internet. They made it looked like we were lying to them that the wifi wasnt working and we dont know how to connect, until they figured out they gave us the wrong password. Come the day we needed to checkout, it was pouring outside, again not even one staff cared to let us borrow an umbrella we can use to go to our car, so we had to walk to our car while raining, and again no one even cared to just even open the door for my wife who was with our luggages, i had to back up our car to the main entrance so we could load up our luggages, where was the security you ask?! He was just simply gazing at us while we get rained on and what's the cherry on top? While we were drenched in the rain and him gazing at us, he was freaking cutting his nails!!! Such a worst experience, do not go to this hotel!

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money they charge

They should have told us that at the beginning so we would have stayed in the mall. The internet was very slow when available as it went down both days we were there and the first day the cable went out for almost 6 hours. For a hotel that has no refrigerator and no mini bar they want 2000 peso as a security deposit. There are lots of hotels in the same area for a bit less that will have better rooms and better service from the front desk personnel. I would rate this as a 1 or 2 star and most likely will never stay at this place again. Was very disappointed also if you stay in one of the rooms on the balcony side the ash trays are right outside your room so all the smoke just goes right in. Wish they would have asked if we smoke as we did not so we should have been put inside. Never Again at this place.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: This is the worst hotel I have been in. The staff was excellent and very helpful but the facilities stunk. I was originally booked in a regular twin room but found the black bathroom tiles deplorable and worn out and the room was so noisy. I asked for an upgrade to a "deluxe" twin but it was worse because the toilet was leaking water all the way through the carpet in the entry way and the bathtub drain was working very slowly, therefore water would collect up to 4 inches in the tub while I was taking just a 10 minute shower. So between my sister and I, we have to wait for the water to drain before the next person could take a shower. I was afraid that all the water overflowing on the floor from who knows where would collapse the bathroom and find myself the next floor down.The room smelled of mildew. If it were not for the trouble of cancelling and loosing my money and rebooking myself and moving to another hotel, I decided to bear the inconveniences for four nights. Also, I find the Php2,000 reclaimable deposit insulting. This hotel needs to be closed down and renovated. Replace the carpets with tiles to keep it more sanitary looking.

sample_comments.title: disappointed in our stay
sample_comments.text:
We chose this hotel because it was near the airport and a newer hotel. But we were disappointed as soon as we entered the room: the room smelled of cigarette smoke and several large stains were on the carpet. When I complained about the smell of the room the staff said the hotel was fully occupied and they could not move us to another room. Also, the bathtub drain did not drain properly so when each of us would take a shower we wound up standing in several inches of dirty bath water before we were finished. I complained several times but for some reason they were not able to fix the problem and we just had to deal with standing in the dirty water while we showered. Additionally the carpet was very dirty. They provide free slippers and you should definitely use them. Our kids ran around the room barefoot and the bottoms of their feet became black from the dirty carpet so we had to wash their feet again before putting them in the bed. Lastly, during the night another couple tried to enter our room. When they knocked on our door I found out they had been given the same room that we were already in. (Thankfully I had put the deadbolt on so they did not enter our room while we were in bed.) 
On a separate note, this hotel advertises a free breakfast (at the Kenny Rodgers chicken restaurant next door.) I liked the convenience of having this eatery next door and their food is ok, but they do not open til 7:00am, so you can not have the free breakfast before that time. (Also, not all the items on the breakfast menu are eligible for the free breakfast.
This is a small hotel (only 40 something rooms) and is only about a year or so old. Most of the staff seemed friendly, however a few of the front desk staff seemed unfriendly and uncaring. Overall, we were very disappointed with our stay and will not choose this hotel again.

Do they have to ring me at 9:55 AM to tell me that our check out is at noon? Preferably, reminders should be done about 11:30 AM or 11:45 AM. I was so upset that I yelled at the lady at the reception & we rushed out of the building after getting our P2k deposit. I know she was doing her job but management should change that policy. Why the need to have courtesy call 2 hrs before check out time?
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Mary, 

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us and we sincerely apologized for any inconvenience you encountered during your stay. Departure Courtesy call is a practice in all hotel to get feedback from the guest which seeks the details of the time of check out to be recorded by the front desk on duty, the main purpose of this call is to know the status of the particular room if the guest will extend or will stay longer than the usual check out time. Also, we are always in high demand we always make sure that we kept updated with the status of the room for the reference of Reservations and Housekeeping Team.

The area is within walking distance from Mall of Asia, and is close to a lot of nightlife. This is still a good value but looking at the competition, I would highly consider these new hotels.

Hotel was running short on towels so we waited 30minutes to get them. Called front desk because our hot water was not working, called again because the wifi was not connecting. Free breakfast was provided by restaurant next door so you had to exit hotel property to get to breakfast. Only transportation to get to the mall or anywhere else is by taxi which hotel charge a leg and a arm. If you dont mind stepping out towards the mainroad you can get a cheaper taxi and not the one provided by the hotel. Good thing it was only for two nights. I think i will go back to shogun suites, copacabana hotel, or heritage hotel for peace of mind. There are newer hotels near by which i shall try and many more being built but i wont go back to 88 Courtyard. Frontdesk people act like they care about any inconvenience but start talking about you behind your back as soon as they see you in the lobby- rude and unprofessional, as the tagalogs say it: suplada talaga!

sample_comments.title: Poor experience
sample_comments.text: Unfortunately, this was my first poor experience at the hotel. Having stayed here several times before, I was quite shocked when I saw the state of the room I was given. It was a ground floor unit, and I suggest you request for a higher floor unit. The area outside the room was at the swimming pool and there were many mosquitoes there at night. In the room, the aircon was noisy and the walls had mould. The toilet had a cockroach inside and there was a terrible sewage smell that cannot seem to go away even with the extractor fan turned on. Furthermore, the flush was also working poorly. It does not seem to refill its water tank immediately after a flush, and I had to wait a few minutes before I could flush again. Overall, the standard rooms on the ground floor are poor. Please request for rooms on the higher floors as those are much better.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Evangeline,

Thank you for staying with us many times. We apologize for any inconvenience. For problems with the rooms, we have coordinated with the housekeeping department to ensure that the rooms were completely cleaned and everything worked well before they were released. We also do general cleaning once a month in all rooms and in public areas, we are currently checking for defective rooms to prevent future increases in such incidents. 
 
 We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the hotel, and we look forward to your continued support so that we can provide you with a better experience.

With much appreciation,

Kiok Manulo
Reservations Officer

sample_comments.title: Lesson learned
sample_comments.text: Let's see...where to start? CHECK IN: arrived the hotel early in the AM from a 14-hour flight. Understood that there weren't rooms available at the time (if that's even true). But to charge a guest additional P1600 to check in as early as 12nn, I think, is ridiculous. So we had to wait till 2pm. Fine. Rooms are...well, you get what you pay for. I'll leave it at that. Their pool looks like it hasn't been cleaned since their opening. No gym. Wifi sucks. Wifi really sucks. Their front desk personnel need professional training. I asked for a towel because they placed a ripped one that looked like a rug in my room & the front desk asked if I had extra people in my room and wanted to charge for a towel. So i let them in my room for them to see that I don't have any extra people and then I gave them the "rug/towel" that was in my bathroom. I trusted the reviews. But i have expectations as I've traveled the world and have never been treated this way. Go elsewhere. Oh. Upside: free breakfast.

sample_comments.title: NOT THE BEST STAFFS
sample_comments.text:
I went in Manila just for a night to watch a concert. My father booked this for me and used his own card. So when I arrived there, I was asked to pay. Before I went there my father told me that it was already paid because the amount was already deducted from his bank account. I wasn't expecting it. So I told them about it and they told me that the payment is only made upon arrival. They let me choose to use the card or to pay in cash. I told them to use the card since it was my father who will pay for the booking and that the amount was already deducted. But they said they'll need the physical card and they didn't deduct, it only 'floating'. But my father is abroad and it'll be impossible for me to get the card. I asked if is it okay just to present a picture of it and an authorization letter from my father. They told me No and that they need to email him first and they told me it would be a long process. I was stressed because I was tired and to experience that was the last thing I want. I asked them suggestions that I can do, but they told me to contact Agoda because the booking was made thru it. I told them why not them? because I'm a customer here. Why not them? They even suggested to cancel it. Of course I wouldn't, the amount was deducted from my father's bank account. My point is, they're really not helpful. They should help customers what to do in situations like this, because I know I'm not the only one who experienced this. 

Anyways, the room was clean. It was nice. I'm just dismayed of the breakfast because I wasn't expecting it will be from the restaurant beside the hotel building. I was new to me.

sample_comments.title: Would never ask for the pick-up service again
sample_comments.text:
I reservate pick-up for my friend, but he didn't met the driver at the terminal, I've call the hotel 3 times try to reach the driver but even their stuff can't reach him...
After 1.5hr he gave up, just took a taxi to hotel, already 2am
The worst, still charged 500 for this . 

After claim they are willing to give him an pick up service with 250 next time...kinda reasonable.

The hotel is good, but the pickup service isn't.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
Staffs are courteous except for the lobby guard and one of woman I talked to over the phone. I asked for an additional WiFi password and she recommended I take it down and test. So had to grab my device after taking note of the credentials and set it up however I over heard the woman "ang tagal naman" when I was almost done entering the credentials. So I just politely said "Ok na Miss, salamat". If naiisip ka you can just simply ask "Sir ok na po ba? ". I didn't made you wait too long to be honest. 

Check in and check out is fast, room was immediately available though I think we came 15 minutes earlier. They have someone ready to assist with baggage, parking and opening the lobby door. 

They have I think 6 parking slots and when we arrived there were slots available and reserved so no hassle. The following day after returning late in the hotel there was no more parking slots available. Had to use the parking space on Kenny Roger's beside the hotel which is also owned by the hotel owner. 

Room smells like a wet wood or like a room that wasn't opened for a long time. So we had to turn on the exhaust fan in the bathroom until the following day to let it out. 

Some part of the room wall don't look good. The wall paper seems got wet and started to blackened. There's also trace of water drip just below the aircon. 

Aircon is working properly, it just didn't smell good because of the room smell. 

Bathroom is ok except for the shower drain which is not leveled with the flooring hence most of the water didn't drain properly. 

WiFi connection is OK except that they give you 1 day worth of connection and you ask again for one the following day. We stayed there for 3 days, why not just gives us 3 days worth of connection. 

Room we got is in ground floor and beside the pool area where you can smoke. But do note that since this is beside pool area it can crowded and noisy. 

Location is near Baclaran and a lot of people around. A lot of stores to eat from

sample_comments.title: Too many fees
sample_comments.text: It feel below the standard that were reported on the site. The shower heads at the pool were broken. I saw a cockroach crawling near the pool side. I had a difficult time trying to open the door since they use actual keys to open it. Two things that pissed me off the most were their fees. I originally booked the room for 3 people and they charged me an extra $15 to add one more person (note: I did make sure I ordered a two bedroom room). Second, they charged me a fee (500 pesos) to remove the stain in the sheets. That really got me pissed off. Aren't all hotels suppose to clean all their sheets anyways? sample_comments.title: Some good things, But....
sample_comments.text: The above things I liked about the hotel were very appreciated. The tv selection was better than expected as well. I did have some issues. I had arranged with the hotel for a ride from the airport. No agent made himself known to me. Only one agent was holding a sign for anyone from our flight in the entire terminal actually. I ended up overpaying a taxi due to lack of knowledge of such situations there. This was not a good way to start off with my stay. They told me the driver was indeed at the airport. If this were the case, it is quite obvious he did not make much effort to make himself known. In fact I take issue with this claim. The airport was not that big nor busy. It would be a no brainer to spot someone trying to make himself known. The hotel would be much better served having ice buckets and machine than delivering tiny buckets of ice. The main problem was the shower. Although aesthetically nice, the hot water was very inconsistent and I always had to adjust the knobs. The pressure ranged from barely acceptable to completely unacceptable! The last several showers I took had no hot water at all and of course bad pressure. The hotel looks nice and on the surface is nice, BUT because of these more major issues, I will seek a different hotel next time.

sample_comments.title: I hope you've listened to my request at first...
sample_comments.text:
Room was clean. Breakfast provided by restaurant next door was OK too.

My biggest issue during my stay: No hot shower for 2 nights.
On my first night, I had no hot water from shower, and I requested for a fix on the next day (it was 1:30a on my arrival). Since the tap water is not too cold, I could still withstand it. Next morning, I requested to fix hot water in person at the front desk again.

On my second night, when I was back from my work and asked for a status on the front desk, the crew said the heater should be fixed and asked me to try. Regretfully, there were still no hot water. I raised my problem to the front desk again and the room service reported to me the heater was broken and would arrange me to another room next day. 

Finally I had a hot shower in the new room on my third night.

Please, fix the issue on the communication. I try to be cool, but cold shower won't help, especially if I feel my request has been ignored for a whole day.

sample_comments.title: Gave us a hard time storing our luggage
sample_comments.text:
We've stayed at this place a few times before and have had no issues storing our luggages. But one time the front desk person says there's no space, and she had one of the bell boys backing her up and looking at us like we were twisting their arms to store our luggages when it was the receptionist making it a big deal. Lol we were just chilling there and not being difficult at all if it's a no then it's a no but she had asked the other bell boy to look anyway if there's a space in their storage and when that person came back he gave an okay to store our luggages. The receptionist still whispering something under her breath. We're only gonna be gone for a few days too. I just did not understand why it was suddenly a big deal storing the luggage. I'll give them the benefit of the doubt maybe because it was during the holiday season so maybe they had more visitors than usual asking to store their luggage. But if there's a space why is she saying there's not? Did someone reserve it to her in advance? I had sent a notification via email too.

Anyway, the person who stored our luggage received a good tip from us. But we will not be staying at this place anytime soon or ever again because of that experience.

sample_comments.text: The staff is great -all courteous but my issue is that there is no signal in the rooms, therefore no WIFI; also was given only ONE KEY - which make sit difficult for the 2 of us after we put the one key on the wall to turn on the electricity in the room. sample_comments.title: used to be our fave hotel
sample_comments.text: We used to stay here in this hotel for a total of 9 nights between February and July of 2015 according to Agoda but we stayed more from time to time just by walking in without a confirmed booking reservation too. They're a new small hotel located just at the back of The Heritage Hotel for those who'd have some difficulty finding it. The guards, the waiters, housekeeping and the front desk were amazing especially one receptionist named Leslie. They all made us feel soooooo welcomed, they're really friendly and accommodating. The room has an adequate size not too small and not too big, interior was of the modern standard, we like the fact that they have bidet sprays in the toilet - which was really a plus for us.. however we had a bit of an issue with the quality of the toiletries (aka shampoo, conditioner, toothbrush & toothpaste) it was like of the motel's quality type though. Usually we can ask for another set of them when we go back in the hotel to take a shower before going to bed and there has been no problem but there came that time we had a bit of an argument with the hotel's general manager dark-skinned tall guy who seems to insist that for each day only one set of toiletries must be provided. How about if you use the pool? Or go outside the dirty streets of Baclaran? got wet in the rain? had an exhausting tiring day of Manila and you just want to take another shower just right before you lay down your body and take a rest? And to think that we were their regular customers whom they've lost just because of that petty incident. We were treated like motel-goers begging for toiletries. We never came back again up to this date.

The location is excellent . a 100php cab to MOA or IKEA. The breakfast at Kenny Rogers next door is OK - only a few choices, but service is usually good and the meals are hot.
sample_comments.negatives: The flooring on all the hallways is tile. -- which fundamentally is OK .. HOWEVER, any sounds from the hallway are amplified. This behavior is obviously not always something the hotel can control -- but be prepared to be awaken in the middle of the night by rude drunk guests.

sample_comments.title: GOOD for short stay
sample_comments.text:
We stayed end of JULY 2022. 

Pro's:
*easy to check in, less than 3-5 mins
*accessible to establishments like malls, and restaurants, with near 24/7 Kenny Rogers(stone away).
*Easy to book/hail a taxi (I prefer GRAB)
*Friendly and attentive staff
*secure area (it is near to the road but not close enough to disturb you from sleeping)
Con's:
*worn out bedding (No comforter, it was bedsheet-a thin flannel sheet- bedsheet again), much better with a comforter for a tight sleep
*beds were a bit stiff, feeling sore the next day
*bathrooms are ok (bring your own toiletries
*water pressure from the water closet was not great. Need to press longer to flush
*Thin walls, you can hear the staff talking

Kiok Manulo

sample_comments.title: Decent stay
sample_comments.text: The hotel is as advertised. The room was big and clean. A little rough around the edges, but not to bad for the price. Very weak pressure and the water never really got hot. 2nd issue is that it is kind of difficult for Uber/Grab to find the hotel. It is on a side street right near an overpass and some 1 way streets or streets with barriers in the middle. Sometimes the drivers got confused trying to find our location. Overall, it was an OK stay.

sample_comments.title: Almost a grsat stay
sample_comments.text:
My experience ay the hotel was fine until i realised that my Starbucks tumbler was not on the table in the room when i returned at 9pm at night. I had checked in at about 3pm and placed my tumbler beside the kettle as i do in most hotels i stay at. I left the room with 2 companions at 445pm. The next day upo checkout i highlighted the lost of my tumbler to the front desk. Their response
1. We dont hold the spare key so its not possible for anyone to enter. Hmm then how does Housekeeping clean the rooms? 
2. Perhaps one of your companions took it. Now they say my friends took it!? 

I mention that when we got in last night, my friends had gone to tbe pool and i came down to ask for help with the sink. It had been npy more than 2mins. When i went up by stairs (2nd floor room) i noticed the room door was slightly opened as the door had not shut. The carpet was pretty thick. Perhaps someone walked past and got the tumbler then? Could they check the cctv. They said they would. I doubt.

sample_comments.title: Very clean and modern hotel
sample_comments.text:
We only stayed here one evening, and would have liked to have stayed longer but unfortunately they were fully booked for next night.
We had just arrived in Manila from El Nido so it only took about 10 minutes by taxi to get to the hotel.
The lobby was very modern and the actual deluxe room we had with two twin beds was very spacious and clean. There was a fridge, hair dryer and kettle and the WIFI was excellent.
The pool did not look very inviting so I never tried this out. 
Although we were under the flight path, we never heard any noise as we were overlooking the pool and the windows were double glazed.
The location was on the main street, close to the Baclaran market, the LRT station and about 20 minutes to the SM Asia Mall.
Staff were polite and very professional.

Staff were straight on for the 0530 wake up call I requested. 

I'd stay again as it was 15-20 minutes from the airport.

sample_comments.title: Just need few amenities but overall stay was good.
sample_comments.text:
My daughter and I stayed in this hotel for one night only. I chose to book here to find out for mmyself what the hotel is like and the cuscustomer service of the staff. so that I will have more options next time The customer service was good maybe even better than other hotels, There was a typhoon when we arrived in Manila and so was a heavy downpour. Our bellman assisted us with our heavy luggage. and brought us to our room. Now the room amenities are where just my expectations aren't quite met. I don't know if all rooms have the same amenities. I booked a standard room with a queen-size bed city view. There was no Kleenex, no microwave, no hair dryer, no iron/ironing board, no fridge, and no coffee maker The towels in the bathroom weree
two big towels and 1 for the feet, there were no hand towels or face towels provided. The bathroom was okay, the hot shower was working pretty well. The room has a good space. Our room comes with a free complimentary of two bottled water and green tea but no sugar. Perhaps this hotel can provide sugar at least. I think they don't provide coffee because they are selling hot coffee downstairs. Our reservation didn't come with breakfast because you will get or have your breakfast at Kenny Rogers restaurant is just beside this hotel. And I am not fond of Kenny Rogers's chicken. But you can order food at the hotel though which I didn't do either. I just ordered from the Food Panda. There are no eating places nearby that are within walking distance except for Kenny Rogers. The one thing that I found was this hotel has a nearby lodge which helped us. I wanted to extend our stay for 4 hours at the hotel but due to being fully booked, they can't extend our stay. So then the nearby lodge was a big help. It was the bellman who told us about the lodge. We stayed at the lodge for 4 hours and paid 485 pesos while our luggage was in the safety of the hotel.Hope this review helps
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

Thank you for sharing a review of your recent experience. Regarding your comments regarding the hair dryer, iron/board, and sugar, we do offer these amenities at the request of the guest. Unfortunately, your room don't have a fridge since your booking is a Standard Room. Only our Superior & Deluxe room has fridge inside the room. Only our bar/café section has a microwave, and guests' food can be reheated upon request. We regret not living up to some of your expectations. We are looking forward to welcome you again soon on your next visit to the city. 

With much appreciation, 
88 Courtyard Hotel

sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Ella,

Thank you for recently staying at our hotel. We appreciate you choosing to stay with us. If a guest arrives early and there isn't a room available yet, we'll let them keep their luggage with us first if they have places to go. Our standard check-in and check-out times are 2:00 PM and 12 PM, respectively. If a room is already available, we are allowing guests to check in with a surcharge. We are currently remodeling our rooms so that they will be better for our guests.

Despite the inconvenience, we hope you had a nice time. When you come back to the city, we want to see you again.

With much appreciation,
Kiok Manulo
Reservations

sample_comments.text: Early chevk in
sample_comments.response:

Reservations

sample_comments.title: Good stay with good restaurant food!
sample_comments.text: Very accessible location to MOA, Baclaran and esp AIRPORT! Staff are very polite and approachable esp the front desk and the guards!
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for the wonderful review of our Hotel. We and the team are very delighted to know that you are happy with the service that we provide. We truly appreciate feedback such as yours as this motivates us to continue providing consistent quality and personalized service.

Kiok Manulo
Reservations

sample_comments.text: There is poor mobile network signal inside the room, and the wifi password does not work. A staff will need to enter the network password into your phone which is weird and a security concern for me. I have been to many hotels but this is the 1st time I encountered a network password that does not work as given and would need a staff to enter another password manually for you to be able to connect to the wifi network.

Reservations

sample_comments.text: Price is reasonable. Hotel and rooms beginning to show wear. My room did not have a refrigerator and the shower sealing on the floor leaked so after every shower there was always a puddle of water on the floor outside of the shower. Rooms are good size and the TV works with a good selection of channels.
sample_comments.response:

We appreciate you sharing your feedback with us. We're sorry for the inconvenience it has caused during your stay. Reviews like this would help us improve our services and facilities. For our mini bar, we could suggest you book our Superior Rooms or Deluxe Rooms as that comes with a fridge, if the guests want to put something in the refrigerator we are also offering them to let us store it for them in our restaurant if their room does not come with a fridge. For rooms, we would raise this concern to our housekeeping to make sure all is checked before releasing to our guests. Thank you for your kind understanding. 

Despite the inconvenience encountered in the hotel, we do hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, so we can provide a better experience.

 

With much appreciation,

Kiok Manulo
Reservations

The male front desk assigned in the afternoon, however,, is not responsive to calls. He is not always present in the desk for queries.
